home.welcomeSubtitle: Sign in to see videos from people you follow
home.title: Home
home.subtitle: Videos from people you follow

discovery.title: Discover
discovery.subtitle: Explore videos from the network
discovery.verifiedOnlyHint: Showing only videos with ProofMode verification

comments.title: Comments
comments.beFirstToShare: Be the first to share your thoughts!

messages.title: Direct messages
messages.subtitle: Talk to support, send vines privately, or keep a thread going with people you follow.
messages.shareWithLink: Your next message will include a vine link.
messages.signerUnsupported: Your current signer can log you in, but it does not expose NIP-44 encryption yet. Switch to an nsec, bunker, or another signer that supports NIP-44 to use direct messages on web.
messages.supportSummary: Ask about bugs, moderation, or account issues.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Need help? We're here to assist you.
support.helpCenterDescription: Find answers to your questions about Divine.
support.messageSupportDescription: Reach the support inbox directly inside Divine using private NIP-17 messages.
support.contactDescription: Create a ticket and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
support.githubDescription: Report bugs, request features, or browse existing issues on our GitHub repositories.
support.communityDescription: Join our community discussions and connect with other Divine users on Nostr.
support.communityBody: Divine is built on Nostr, a decentralized social protocol. Find us on your favorite Nostr client!

tagPage.notFoundDescription: The requested tag could not be found.
tagPage.subtitle: Browse videos tagged with #{{tag}}

categoriesPage.title: Categories
categoriesPage.subtitle: Browse videos by topic
categoriesPage.metaDescription: Explore video categories on Divine - comedy, music, dance, animals, sports, food, and more.
